message:
perf(packs): add Aho-Corasick for O(n) keyword matching + cache might_match

Performance optimizations for pack evaluation pipeline:

1. Added aho-corasick dependency for multi-pattern string matching
2. Added `keyword_matcher` field to Pack struct with AhoCorasick automaton
3. Modified `register_pack()` to build automaton during registration
4. Modified `might_match()` to use automaton when available (O(n) vs O(k*n))
5. Modified evaluator two-pass to pre-compute candidate packs once

Benchmark results show 23-32% improvement on common paths:
- safe_git: 4.4µs → 3.0µs (32% faster)
- dangerous_git: 8.9µs → 6.8µs (23% faster)
- simple_heredoc: 28.4µs → 26.6µs (6% faster)
- medium_heredoc: 1.88ms → 1.76ms (6.5% faster)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -592,6 +592,7 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "destructive_command_guard"
 version = "0.2.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "aho-corasick",
  "assert_cmd",
  "ast-grep-core",
  "ast-grep-language",

@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@ chrono = { version = "0.4", default-features = false, features = ["std", "clock"
 fancy-regex = "0.14"
 regex = "1.10"              # For RegexSet in heredoc detection
 memchr = "2.7"
+aho-corasick = "1.1"        # Multi-pattern string matching for keyword quick-reject
 colored = "2.1"
 dirs = "5.0"
 clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "env"] }
